evals.description: Single competitor — verifies full profile structure and assessment fields
assertions: Returns valid JSON without a top-level error field
competitors array contains exactly 1 profile
Each profile has name, url, homepage, content, ai_citation_readiness, technical, reviews, social, and assessment fields
homepage contains headline, value_prop_clear, primary_cta, phone_visible, clicks_to_contact, and trust_signals
content contains service_pages, blog, portfolio, and about_team objects
ai_citation_readiness.score is one of 'high', 'medium', or 'low'
ai_citation_readiness.signals_found is an array
assessment contains strengths (array of 3), weaknesses (array of 2), and differentiators
comparison_matrix and key_gaps_vs_target fields are present
Output contains no strategic recommendations — assessment.strengths and assessment.weaknesses are factual, evidence-based statements only

evals.description: Multiple competitors — verifies all profiles returned
assertions: Returns valid JSON without a top-level error field
competitors array contains exactly 3 profiles
Each profile has the full schema including homepage, content, reviews, social, and assessment
comparison_matrix.dimensions is a non-empty array
comparison_matrix.data array contains one entry per competitor
key_gaps_vs_target is a non-empty array of strings

evals.description: One unreachable competitor — partial profile with error, others complete
assertions: Returns valid JSON — does not fail the entire run because one fetch failed
competitors array contains 2 profiles
The failed competitor's profile contains an error field and null sections
The successful competitor's profile is fully populated
All competitors in the input are represented in the output array
